# F042 Fresh-Seed Small-Cap Validation

## Decision
`F042_FRESH_SMALL_CAP_VALIDATION_PASS_DIAGNOSTIC`

## Purpose
F041 found that a fixed tiny residual cap of `0.05` could preserve all held-out gates on seeds 0-4, but that finding used held-out diagnostics. F042 pre-registers the same small-cap rule and validates it on fresh synthetic seeds 5-9.

## Selection Rule
`pre-registered after F041: choose the best train-continuous-safe scale from {0, 0.025, 0.05}; held-out rows are scoring-only`

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.050000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`
- selected transition: `0.463731`
- floor transition: `0.462202`
- selected delta cosine: `0.914724`
- floor delta cosine: `0.912506`
- selected recall@1: `0.807407`
- floor recall@1: `0.807407`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.001529` (min `0.000670`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.002218` (min `0.000654`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- heldout broken rows: `0`
